title: pelargonium astragalifolium
intro: Pelargonium astragalifolium, also known as Astragalus-leaved Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium astragalifolium include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
